info.name: Onfleet Tasks API
info.description:
The Onfleet Tasks API manages delivery and pickup tasks across the Onfleet
last-mile delivery platform. Tasks are the atomic unit of work — each
represents a single pickup or dropoff with a destination, recipient,
completion window, and optional dependencies.


Contact Support:
 Name: Onfleet Support
 Email: support@onfleet.com

request.description: Asynchronously create up to 100 tasks per request; results are returned via the taskBatchCreateJobCompleted webhook.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

query.description: (Required) Start of the search range in Unix milliseconds.
End of the search range in Unix milliseconds.
Cursor returned from a previous call to walk pagination.
Comma-separated list of task state values (0=Unassigned, 1=Assigned, 2=Active, 3=Completed).

request.description: Return a paginated collection of tasks; uses lastId-based pagination with up to 64 tasks per page.
